what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon representing a document page with a folded corner and horizontal text lines.
observations: The SVG uses a 24x24 viewBox with explicit width and height set to 24.
Rendering is stroke-based with fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
The first path draws the page outline and folded corner geometry.
The second path draws three horizontal document-content lines.
standouts: Theme color is inherited through currentColor.
The icon is built from two compact path elements.
The document shape includes both a folded corner and interior text marks.
conventions: Uses common line-icon attributes: rounded stroke caps, rounded joins, and 1.5 stroke width.
Uses path-only SVG geometry without embedded styles, ids, classes, or metadata.
notes: A compact reusable document/file icon expressed as a themeable SVG stroke asset.
questions: Should the 1.5 stroke width match the rest of the icon set?
Is the folded-corner shape intended to represent a generic document or a specific file type?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a document icon, and the SVG depicts a document page with a folded corner and text lines.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a generic document icon that can inherit surrounding text or UI color in a design system.
contribution: A reusable currentColor document icon with folded-page geometry and interior text-line marks for interfaces that need a document or file visual affordance.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 themeable SVG line icon of a document page with a folded corner and three horizontal text lines.
intention_for_embedding: It was made to serve as a reusable document/file icon asset within a design system.
